## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for SEO Specialist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is an agency focused on content marketing and SEO, serving 50+ clients with AI-augmented processes](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [The role involves developing standardized SEO strategies and processes across client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Tavish has extensive SEO experience from DHI Group (Dice.com) and previous roles, with recent focus on AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Both parties are interested in leveraging AI/LLMs to enhance SEO and content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Company Overview

  - [Agency model with 50+ clients, focused on content marketing and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Using AI to augment and scale content production processes](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Looking to improve standardization of SEO practices across client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Current bottleneck: onboarding 2 new clients per week, aiming for 3-4](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### SEO Specialist Role Details

  - [Develop strategies and processes for consistent SEO implementation across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Focus on meta-level SEO elements (site structure, content strategy) rather than individual article writing](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Create automated/standardized processes for site audits, content strategy refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Collaborate with client teams to implement best practices efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Tavish's Background and Experience

  - [Most recent role: SEO at DHI Group (Dice.com), laid off in July 2025](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Implemented content strategy focused on job/career clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Increased KPIs on candidate-side content](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Previous experience: Web design agency, construction company digital marketing](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Recent focus on integrating AI into SEO and content processes](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### SEO Strategy Approach

  - [Start with business KPIs and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Develop topical models and content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Balance informational and conversion-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Conduct competitor analysis for differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Ensure technical SEO fundamentals are addressed](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)

### LLMs and Search Industry Impact

  - [Tavish views LLMs as potentially bringing search back to more human-centric, quality-focused results](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
  - [Challenges in measuring LLM traffic and impact on SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=2195.0)
  - [Interest in developing citation measurement tools for AI search](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)

### GEO (AI-Optimized SEO) Practices

  - [GrowthX currently focused on monitoring and SEO-based optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [Experimenting with earned mentions and alternative citation strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Tavish interested in developing measurement and optimization techniques](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tavish to email additional questions to Morelia or Andy, who will loop in Jason](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=2522.0)
  - [Jason to review Tavish's candidacy with the hiring team](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=2530.0)
  - [Potential follow-up on Tavish's ideas for AI-augmented SEO processes and measurement](https://fathom.video/share/ksdu_2M6bZtvG-HdGdkEywdUQDXYsoz-?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
